name: The Lakehouse
image_sign_text: WAREHOUSE AND LAKE. AT LAST. TOGETHER.
effect: Unify lake flexibility and warehouse structure into a single platform narrative. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: CONVERGENCE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a warehouse already exists: Declare it legacy and proceed.

clauses.name: SQL OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When questioned about architecture: Invoke SQL compatibility as resolution.

clauses.name: REBRANDING EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the data lake card is in play: Absorb it. The lake is now a feature.

witness_quote: It's the best of both worlds.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is this just the warehouse again?
